name: Zoho Sheet Data API
description: REST API for reading, writing, and manipulating Zoho Sheet spreadsheet data, cells, formulas, workbooks, worksheets, charts, pivot tables, and tabular data. Uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

potentialAction.name: worksheet.records.add
potentialAction.description: Add new records to a worksheet

potentialAction.name: worksheet.records.update
potentialAction.description: Update existing records in a worksheet

potentialAction.name: worksheet.create
potentialAction.description: Add a new worksheet to a workbook

potentialAction.name: worksheet.delete
potentialAction.description: Delete a worksheet from a workbook

potentialAction.name: tabular_range.records.fetch
potentialAction.description: Read tabular range records with optional filtering and sorting

potentialAction.name: tabular_range.records.add
potentialAction.description: Add new rows to a tabular range

potentialAction.name: tabular_range.records.update
potentialAction.description: Update rows in a tabular range matching criteria

potentialAction.name: tabular_range.records.delete
potentialAction.description: Delete rows in a tabular range matching criteria

potentialAction.name: workbook.data.get
potentialAction.description: Get workbook metadata including worksheet list
